lane: ecosystem build intent truth + minimal contract model

phase_a_immediate_truth_fix.goal: Hide Build when the ecosystem build contract is missing.
applied: Replaced `build_enabled` with `build_visible = build_enabled AND build_visible_by_contract` everywhere the build action is conditionally surfaced
API endpoint `release/lifecycle/build` for `gmd` now returns 409 with contract-aware reason

phase_b_minimal_build_contract_model.goal: Introduce minimal ecosystem build contract shape with three execution-oriented kinds.

fields.produces: list[str] of image names produced by the build (empty unless source_build)
fields.source_repos: list[str] of repos that the build reads from (source_build only)
fields.build_command: string explaining what the build invokes (source_build only)
fields.upstream: object with project / delivered_via / chart (mirror_upstream only)
fields.note: human-readable explanation of the contract for the operator

kinds.source_build: AMOF runs a real first-party build for this ecosystem's images. Lifecycle Build action is supported.
kinds.mirror_upstream: Ecosystem deploys upstream-provided images via Argo CD or similar. No AMOF-driven build. Build action hidden.
kinds.unsupported: No build path of any kind is wired today. Build action hidden.

phase_b_minimal_build_contract_model.backwards_compat: lifecycle_capabilities.build_target_truth retained as a derived projection so existing UI clients keep working.

classification.demo-microsaas: source_build (still shares the AMOF platform build path)
classification.gmd: mirror_upstream (deploys upstream googlecloudplatform/microservices-demo via Argo CD)

gmd_overview_ecosystem_build_contract.note: gmd deploys upstream googlecloudplatform/microservices-demo images via Argo CD. There is no first-party gmd-app build path in AMOF today, so Build is hidden.

live_api_proof.gmd_post_build_response_detail: Lifecycle action 'build' is not supported for gmd. Supported actions: deploy, promote. Build is hidden because ecosystem 'gmd' has build contract 'mirror_upstream'. Build is only surfaced for ecosystems whose contract kind is 'source_build'.

commits_landed_to_canonical_main.summary: feat(lifecycle): introduce minimal ecosystem build contract; hide Build when not source_build

what_is_required_to_move_gmd_to_source_b: Add a first-party gmd-app build script (e.g. scripts/build-gmd-app.sh) that produces gmd-app image(s) from a source repo declared in ecosystems/gmd/ecosystem.yaml
Register a per-ecosystem build command in scripts/amof/api/command_builder.py (e.g. build_gmd_lifecycle_build_command)
Wire the dispatcher in scripts/amof/api/routers/release.py release_lifecycle_action() to pick the per-ecosystem build command when name == 'gmd'
Update _ecosystem_build_contract('gmd') to return kind='source_build' with the produced image names, source repo paths, and the new build command reference
Update infrastructure/gitops/gmd/chart values to use the locally-built gmd-app image(s) instead of upstream microservices-demo references
Decide image registry strategy (host.k3d.internal:5000 mirror vs ghcr.io)
what_this_slice_intentionally_did_not_do: invent a downstream gmd-app build script
design a per-ecosystem image registry convention
